creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed the fix as ports r383772.

I don't have an old git checkout to check for forced updates but 3a75956 as v1.4.0 tag used to work fine per packages/logs for 1.4.0 and 1.4.0_1:
http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=multimedia&portname=openh264
http://beefy[1-4].isc.freebsd.org/data/latest-per-pkg/openh264/
